name: Mustard Fruit Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 tbsp water with the mustard powder in a small cup.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar and vinegar. Bring to boil, stirring until sugar dissolves. Boil gently for 10 minutes.
3. Add pears, mango, raisins, mustard mixture, onion, garlic, ginger, pepper flakes, and salt. Gently bring to boil, stirring occasionally, until most liquid evaporates and fruit is tender, about 30 minutes. Cool completely before refrigerating in a covered container for up to 1 week. Serve chilled.
